templates.template:
{{ phrase('please_confirm_delete_icon') }}
{{ phrase('please_confirm_that_you_want_to_delete_following:') }}

<xf:selectrow name="options[node_ids][]" value="{{ $options.node_ids ?: '' }}" multiple="multiple" size="7" label="{{ phrase('Select Category') }}" > <xf:option value="">All Categories</xf:option> <xf:foreach loop="$categories" value="$category"> <xf:option value="{$category.node_id}"> {$category.title} </xf:option> </xf:foreach> </xf:selectrow>

{$title}

  • {$node.title}
